reviewed.by: Feature reel for Study Plans — leads with the feature, showcases the plans (Resurrection Deep Dive, the case for God, Deity of Christ, Answering Islam, Bible Reliability, Worldviews, Debate Prep), demotes Advent to a seasonal beat. apologia-orthodoxy gate CLEAN — resurrection beat honors the early-creed rule; Kalam/fine-tuning/moral named as labels only (no 'everything has a cause' / 'science proves design' / 'atheists can't be moral'); denominational neutrality held (topic list creedal-common, 'family or church' = invite, Advent/Lent = calendar on-ramp not obligation); 0 clarifier candidates; no manufactured confidence (mission held). Product claims self-checked accurate vs study-plans.html: 10 guided plans + 2 seasonal challenges, Beginner–Advanced, 14–30 day range, Read/Ask/Debate/Reflect activities. Supersedes study-plans-advent.json (retired).

voiceover: Here's a feature on Apologia Daily worth knowing about: Study Plans. Instead of endlessly browsing, you get a guided, day-by-day path through the evidence — with a clear finish line, and your progress saved as you go. There are ten guided plans, from beginner to advanced, running fourteen to thirty days. Start with the thirty-day Resurrection Deep Dive: the empty tomb, the minimal facts, the earliest creed — then practise it all in real debates. Or build the case for God from the ground up — the Kalam, fine-tuning, the moral argument. There's the Deity of Christ, Answering Islam, Bible Reliability, Worldviews, and a twenty-eight-day Debate Prep. A plan for every question. And these aren't reading lists. Every day gives you something to do: read the evidence, ask the AI tutor, step into the Debate Arena, then reflect and make it your own. Study on your own, or with a group, your family, or your whole church. There are seasonal challenges too — twenty-five questions before Christmas, and forty days before Easter. Start free today at apologia daily dot com, slash study plans.
source: study-plans.html — feature reel for Study Plans (10 guided plans + 2 seasonal challenges). Leads with the feature, showcases the plans, demotes Advent to a seasonal beat. No new doctrinal argument (Incarnation framing per John 1:14).

sub.t: A guided, day-by-day path through the evidence.

lines.t: Then practise it in real debates.
